title: JLG G5-18A Telehandler
description:
- Enclosed Cab w/ Heat  
- Appx 3290 Hour’s
- 4WD
- 5.500 lbs Maximum Lift Capacity
- Auxiliary Hydraulics
- 18’ 4” Maximum Lift Height
- 10’ 11” Maximum Forward Reach
- Cab Fender
- Air Tires
- 48” Pallet Forks
-Three Steering Modes (Round, Crab, 2 Wheel)
